name: StandardRemoteFrameCount
title: StandardRemoteFrameCount
description: Returns the number of standard remote CAN frames on channel x since start of measurement.
return: Number of standard remote CAN frames on channel x since start of measurement.

example.code: write ("Number of standard remote frames on CAN1 = %d", CAN1.StandardRemoteFrameCount);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
